metadata.description: 41 AI agent skills for Claude Code — agentic marketing automation, AI creative agency workflows, and developer productivity tools. Build full marketing strategies, generate brand assets, produce social and video content, and automate software releases — all from your terminal.

plugins.name: marketing-suites
plugins.description: AI marketing agent for Claude Code with 23 specialist skills — automated SOSTAC strategy, SEO optimization, content marketing, email sequences, social media, paid ads, video scripts, PR, influencer outreach, CRO, referral programs, retention, pricing strategy, product launch, sales enablement, community growth, marketing analytics, guerrilla marketing, behavioral psychology, and product positioning. One master agency agent routes every request to the right specialist automatically.

plugins.name: creative-agency-suites
plugins.description: AI creative agency for Claude Code with 15 skills — 4 persistent AI agents (Creative Director, Designer, Strategist, Video Producer) plus 10 production workflows for social posts, carousels, brand identity, logo design, batch asset generation, TikTok/Reels short-form video, YouTube long-form video, clip repurposing, multi-platform export, content research, campaign orchestration, and quality control. Brief Aria the Creative Director and the full team executes.

plugins.name: utility-tools
plugins.description: Developer productivity tools for Claude Code — generate McKinsey-style HTML slide decks from marketing strategies, automate software releases with version bumping, changelog generation, git tagging, and GitHub release publishing. 3 skills for teams shipping fast.

plugins.name: webinar-creator-suite
plugins.description: AI webinar creation pipeline for Claude Code — takes solo creators from vague idea to production-ready slide deck outline and script. One guided workflow orchestrates research, hook generation, angle selection, slide structuring, and script writing. Perfect for thought leadership, lead generation, demos, and training webinars.

plugins.name: prodig-suites
plugins.description: AI product creation system for Claude Code — transforms vague ideas into production-ready products. Supports 4 product families: Knowledge (courses, ebooks, memberships), Templates (prompt packs, digital kits), Software (SaaS, apps, AI tools), and Services (productized consulting). Orchestrated research, strategy, and execution with persistent memory across sessions.
